templates.name: Patrol Sweep
templates.flavor_text: A grunt and its minder, working the perimeter.

templates.name: Scavenger Pair
templates.flavor_text: Two scavengers picking through the rubble. They see you first.

templates.name: Crossfire
templates.flavor_text: One closes, one stays back. Simple but effective.

templates.name: Rearguard
templates.flavor_text: The shieldbearer holds ground while the grunt circles.

templates.name: Advance Party
templates.flavor_text: Two grunts lead. The shieldbearer watches from behind.

templates.name: Overwatch
templates.flavor_text: Arrows from the ridge. Grunts in the gap. Standard formation.

templates.name: The Charge
templates.flavor_text: Three of them, running. No plan. Just teeth.

templates.name: Wall and Volley
templates.flavor_text: Shield up front. Arrows from behind. Classic Cauldron drill.

templates.name: Ambush
templates.flavor_text: They were already here. Waiting.

templates.name: Solo Flanker
templates.flavor_text: Something faster than a grunt. Wrong ring for this one.

templates.name: Mid Patrol
templates.flavor_text: A proper squad. Flanker, shooter, wall.

templates.name: Twin Flankers
templates.flavor_text: Two ash flankers circling opposite sides. Pick one.

templates.name: Berserker Debut
templates.flavor_text: The grunt is the distraction. The berserker is the point.

templates.name: Wall Breaker
templates.flavor_text: The wall holds your attention. The archer takes her time.

templates.name: Glass and Iron
templates.flavor_text: One breaks fast. The other doesn't break at all.

templates.name: Ash Pack
templates.flavor_text: Flankers on the edges, grunt in the middle. They hunt in threes.

templates.name: Suppression Line
templates.flavor_text: Two archers behind a shield. You'll need to close the distance.

templates.name: Berserker Escort
templates.flavor_text: The grunts keep you busy. The berserker keeps you honest.

templates.name: The Wall
templates.flavor_text: Two shield-walls, shoulder to shoulder. Patience or nothing.

templates.name: Glass Volley
templates.flavor_text: One wants to be close. One doesn't. Both want you dead.

templates.name: Full Pack
templates.flavor_text: Flanker, archer, grunt. The mid ring's answer to everything.

templates.name: Elite Forward
templates.flavor_text: A hunter and a caster. The Warden's own.

templates.name: Berserker Pair
templates.flavor_text: Two berserkers. No subtlety. No need.

templates.name: Rift Guard
templates.flavor_text: The caster works behind the wall. You can't reach one without the other.

templates.name: Kill Team
templates.flavor_text: Hunter, berserker, wall. A formation built to end walks.

templates.name: Caster Guard
templates.flavor_text: Two hunters flanking a caster. The outer ring takes its casters seriously.

templates.name: Hunter Pair
templates.flavor_text: Two warden hunters. No tricks. Just pressure.

templates.name: Flanked Approach
templates.flavor_text: Flankers from the sides, rift zones in the center. Nowhere clean to stand.

templates.name: The Siege
templates.flavor_text: Wall, caster, hunter. A siege in miniature.

templates.name: Glass Cannon Run
templates.flavor_text: Two berserkers and a hunter. Fast, fragile, and furious.

templates.name: Final Approach
templates.flavor_text: Hunter, caster, flanker. The standard outer ring gauntlet.
